title: Media Delivery, Range Requests, MP4, HLS, and Streaming Boundaries · Runtime Contract: Private Media Authorization
summary: A video player downloads whole large files for seeking, an origin emits invalid range responses, MP4 metadata sits at the end, and private segment access differs from manifest access. Predict the representation, storage, trust, cost, and recovery evidence before inspecting a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the private media authorization increment in accessible media-delivery and range plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Align manifest and segment authorization, signed cookies or URLs, CORS, key delivery, expiry, seeking, and leakage boundaries.
Model manifests, variant playlists, segments, codecs, durations, naming, cache lifetimes, and atomic publication for adaptive delivery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Private Media Authorization · Theory Private Media Authorization
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 3252 during a regional dependency incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate CloudFront range shape, progressive media layout, and accessible playback; preserve accessible progress, cancellation, status, and recovery evidence; then cancel halfway through and prove every body, part, and goroutine reaches a terminal state. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Align manifest and segment authorization, signed cookies or URLs, CORS, key delivery, expiry, seeking, and leakage boundaries.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Private Media Authorization contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Private Media Authorization · Theory Private Media Authorization.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Bound Private Media Authorization · Theory Private Media Authorization

theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 8109 during an SDK and infrastructure canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate CloudFront range shape, progressive media layout, and accessible playback; keep browser execution deterministic and move AWS claims to an authorized transfer gate; then change the object version and prove stale authority is rejected.
